name: Spicy Thai Coconut Chicken Soup
intro: Indulge in the simplicity and unique Thai twist of this delightful soup recipe, which holds a special place as your favorite. To enhance the flavor profile, opt for whole coconut milk, ensuring a rich and creamy texture that will elevate the taste to new heights. Prepare to savor the harmonious blend of ingredients in this soup, as it takes you on a culinary journey with its Thai-inspired goodness.
method: Mix the chicken with the cornmeal.
Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a 6-quart stock pot over medium-high heat, then fry the chicken for 2-3 minutes until lightly browned. Remove from the stockpot when done.
In the same stockpot, sauté the onion, jalapeños, and garlic in the remaining oil over medium-high heat for 3-4 minutes.
Add spices, chili paste, coconut milk and stock. Let it boil. When it starts boiling, reduce heat and let it simmer (covered) for 20 minutes.
Stir in cabbage, snow peas, and chicken. Cook for 3-4 minutes. Serve with green onions and lime.
